title: Verify supported variant qualification
preconditions: The three private fixtures are available outside tracked test artifacts together with redacted structural equivalents and unsupported or over-limit adversarial fixtures.
steps: Run variant detection and passive bounded preview across qualified, permission-encrypted, changed-layout, active-content, scan-only, password, malformed, and over-limit cases.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-INGEST-VARIANT-QUALIFICATION holds; only the two evidenced PDF variants qualify and all unsafe or unsupported cases fail before mutation.
